title: First $1500: Skyline Dodge
objective: Survive long enough to build your first $1500 run by dodging incoming hazards, chaining close calls, and choosing when to cut through payout gates for bigger rewards.

controls.outcome: Dash between rooftop lanes to avoid hazards and line up bonus paths.
Bank a higher multiplier chunk, but trigger a denser hazard wave for a few seconds.

controls.input: Brush past hazard edges without contact
controls.outcome: Extend the combo meter and raise score gain.

steps: Start with 3 lanes across a scrolling skyline and a fresh x1 combo.
Dodge incoming hazards like bug swarms, refund storms, and red 'Didn't Work' billboards.
Pass close to hazards to fill the 'First Hit' combo meter; repeated near-misses increase the multiplier.
Every few seconds, a glowing '$1500 gate' appears in one lane.
Entering the gate cashes out bonus score and upgrades the multiplier, but the next wave speeds up and adds mixed hazard patterns.
Miss a dodge once and the run ends immediately.
Last 2-4 minutes as waves escalate until the screen becomes too dense to survive.
scoring: Score rises from survival time, near-miss chains, and successful $1500 gate dives. Each gate taken boosts the active multiplier, but only if you survive the harder follow-up wave. Leaderboards rank total score from a run
tips: Take early near-misses to build multiplier before the first $1500 gate appears.
Skip a gate if your lane options are collapsing; greedy dives usually cause the fail state.
Audio warning chirps signal incoming mixed waves before they enter the screen.
Use short swipes instead of long drags so you can correct during dense patterns.

trendContext.title: I made my first 1500$ from my free mobile game: here is what worked, and what didn't
